title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Mahagun Group Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Mahagun Group Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahagun Group Capital India are looking for an experienced Sales Manager based out of Gwalior. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahagun Group Capital India:
Mahagun Group Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group Capital India!
